headline: Wells Fargo (WFC) Could Be 9% Below Fair Value As Bond Issuance Draws Focus
summary: Wells Fargo (WFC) has been active in the bond market, announcing several new fixed income offerings. These include callable senior unsecured notes with fixed and step up coupons across maturities ranging from 2030 to 2041. See our latest analysis for Wells Fargo. Wells Fargo shares recently gained 5.5% over the past week and 6.4% over the past month, but remain down 8.4% year to date, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 127.5% points to meaningful longer term compounding. Recent...
